UpdateSecurityGroupRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters; see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdateSecurityGroupRules.sourceIp: Inbound rule IP; mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId
UpdateSecurityGroupRules.sourceGroupId: Inbound rule security group ID; mutually exclusive with sourceIp
UpdateSecurityGroupRules.destIp: Outbound rule IP; mutually exclusive with destGroupId
UpdateSecurityGroupRules.destGroupId: Outbound rule security group ID; mutually exclusive with destIp
UpdateSecurityGroupRules.protocol: Protocol; converting tcp/udp to icmp is not currently supported
